channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 2 street light, 13th March
item.description:
Lead to my nan falling over and cutting up and cut open her nose
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Merriman Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 13th March
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochester Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, 13th March
item.description:
Located at flat 1-11 Newstoke House at top of Beatty where it joins Stoke Newington Rd. It needs an “eyes” sign here please.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement grubby, 13th March
item.description:
Wrotham Road pavement gets really grubby. Photos don't do it justice. Is it possible for it to be cleaned please and the 'permanent' blotches removed, the white ones? Thank you very much

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Wrotham Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken street sign in Gainsborough square, 13th March
item.description:
Gainsborough Square street plate on junction with Crook log is Broken.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gainsborough Square, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White parking boxes, 13th March
item.description:
The pavement outside the Co-op in Wrotham has been renewed but the white parking boxes on the pavement, to allow parking half on half off the pavement, haven't been replaced. So people are parking illegally whereas at one time there were boxes and it was legal. Is it possible to replace the boxes please? This was reported to me by a resident, when I was in Wrotham Road. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Wrotham Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole at junction and at top on raised cushion, 13th March
item.description:
Holes
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paget Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 13th March
item.description:
Number of holes especially near junction. Ruts, dangerous surface along rd.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole in the middle of the road, 13th March
item.description:
Already reported a few weeks ago and no action taken

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crawford Gardens, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Dirty Rug Dumped a Week Ago, 13th March
item.description:
This rug was dumped by someone about a week ago and it has stayed on the sidewalk and been rained on/is dirty. Rolled up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Hansler Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped furniture, 13th March
item.description:
Broken sofa left on the corner of Sutherland Road and Findon Road N9.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sutherland Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking sign been graffitied, 13th March
item.description:
The restricted parking sign has been graffitied
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gerda Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass spillage, 13th March
item.description:
There is a lot of glass in the road and on the pavement from the corner of Royal Road/Bexley Lane down to the metal barrier near the walkway down to Prince’s Close.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 175, Bexley Lane, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 months - Hard rubbish in Climsland House courtyard, 13th March
item.description:
This oven which has been reported by residence of Climsland House to Emmanuel multiple times is still in the Climsland House courtyard. The first time it was reported was in January this year this hard rubbish has been here for three months now it needs to be removed immediately. We pay for a weekly hard rubbish collection which never ever ever happens. Absolutely disgraceful. The council should be ashamed of itself.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duchy Place, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: South Croxted Road SE21 opposite houise 205, 13th March
item.description:
South Croxted Road SE21 opposite side of the road to house 205 plain wooden fence graffiti tagged – fence is on the Southwark side of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 108, Alleyn Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: South Croxted Road SE21 opposite side of the road, 13th March
item.description:
South Croxted Road SE21 opposite side of the road to houses 187 to 191 is a green paint fence which has been graffiti tagged – fence is on the Southwark side.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 185,187, South Croxted Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: South Croxted Road SE21 streetlight ID number 28 is on 24/7., 13th March

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 108, Alleyn Road, Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Next to 129 Godstow Road: white door., 13th March
item.description:
Door has been propped up against post on grass.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood

item.title: Mattress on grass verge second cul de sac from roundabout at end of Eynsham Drive., 13th March
item.description:
Mattress has been propped up against tree.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Godstow Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree on footpath, 13th March
item.description:
Due to high winds and entire tree has fallen across the footpath. It needs to be cut up, I would suggest keeping the smaller logs aside so nature can use them or beetles wood worms etc.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Delisle Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet
